description: Style Noteleggings are an important part of a girl's wardrobe. This legging from vishudh is crafted from soft cotton fabric, designed to provide absolute comfort and perfect Fit. Pair it with short or long kurta and ballerina flats for the perfect look.Product DetailsBlack leggings with a soft elastic waistbandMaterial and Care100% cottonWash in cold water with mild detergentDo not bleachWarm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
